title: Managerial Accounting: Managerial accounting only applies to...
summary: Evaluate whether managerial accounting applies only to for-profit or also to non-profit organizations.
prompt: Managerial accounting only applies to for-profit organizations.
solution: Managerial accounting is applicable to all types of organizations, including not-for-profit entities, as it provides essential tools for decision-making and performance evaluation (Page 9).
